title: cistus × incanus var. corsicus
intro: Cistus × incanus var. corsicus, also known as the rockrose or Mediterranean cistus, is a hybrid plant species that is widely found in the Mediterranean region. This shrub has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cistus × incanus var. corsicus include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
